Decision Design Charts

Key Observations

  • Observation The scatter uses the diagonal reference line to separate nodes that approve better than expected from nodes that approve worse than expected.
  • Observation The median approval gap is -25.46 percentage points, and 67.79% of nodes sit below expectation.
  • Observation The mean approval gap is -21.16 percentage points, but this distribution is heavily influenced by sparse nodes with extreme observed rates.
